subcodes.first_line: Thy book hath attained unto the hearing of the Wronged One in this glorious station, at the hour when the Ancient Beauty had established Himself upon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فاز کتابک باصغاء المظلوم فی هذا المقام الکریم حین الذی استوی جمال القدم علی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment
